evals.prompt: Create a React-based slide presentation about 'Web Performance Audits 2026'. Ensure you set up a robust SlideRegistry and define a clean visual theme context.
evals.expected_output: A production-grade React presentation project containing a SlideRegistry config, absolute SlideStage wrappers, and Playwright layout test templates.

evals.prompt: Refactor this existing multi-page slide project to prevent physical file renaming when adding slides, and add a Playwright visual regression test that disables background rotating gear animations.
evals.expected_output: An elegant SlideRegistry structure refactored from old sequential page imports, accompanied by visual test specifications that inject styles to pause continuous CSS animations.
